ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the facility location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the facility location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "wheelchair_access" TEXT /* Wheelchair accessibility status of the facility */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the facility's information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the facility's information has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility feature */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to a feature type table to categorize features */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature's information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature's information has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_features_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wheelchair_accessibility" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the accessibility record belongs to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of wheelchair accessibility (e.g., Wheelchair Access, None) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the wheelchair accessibility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the accessibility information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the accessibility information has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wheelchair_accessibility_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the facility information */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, accessibility trend) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file if it is stored as a file */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the location belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the facility location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the facility location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Geospatial accuracy of the location coordinates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the location information has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_locations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the address information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the address information has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_addresses_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_premises" (
  "premises_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premises */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the premises belongs to */,
  "premises_name" TEXT /* Name of the premises */,
  "premises_type_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to a premises type table to categorize premises */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the premises information */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the premises information has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premises_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_premises_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
